name: resumir-contingut
description: Browser extension to summarize web content using Gemini AI

scripts.manifests:gen: node scripts/merge-manifest.mjs firefox manifest.json && node scripts/merge-manifest.mjs chromium manifest.chromium.json
scripts.postversion: node scripts/bump-version.mjs && node scripts/update-changelog-html.mjs && git add manifest.base.json manifest.json manifest.chromium.json options/settings.html
